newsSince: No material new fundamental change since June 9. The June 12 AGM approved an unchanged CHF32 dividend, long-serving CFO Heinz Hossli departs end-June 2026 (succession underway), and Berenberg upgraded to Buy on a warehouse-automation inflection. Underlying 2025 order-intake rebound (+5.0%, +9.2% local) was previously reported.

sources.label: Berenberg upgrades Interroll to Buy on automation inflection (Investing.com)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent pick-and-shovel for logistics automation feeding AI warehouse orchestration. Since June 9 only an AGM, a CFO departure and a Berenberg upgrade - sentiment/governance, not a fundamental order or margin shift. The automation/e-commerce recovery thesis is intact but unchanged. Hold.
verdicts.bull: Warehouse-automation/e-commerce recovery and order-intake rebound; Berenberg Buy; high-equity balance sheet and material-flow exposure to AI logistics.
verdicts.neutral: Recovery underway but margins still pressured; CFO transition adds near-term uncertainty.
verdicts.bear: Europe industrial/automotive soft, -40% YTD, and the AI-orchestration tie is adjacency; margin headwinds persist.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sustained order-intake acceleration and sorter/automation project wins
verdicts.primaryRisk: Margin pressure and weak European industrial demand; CFO transition
